use_cases: Rendering time-series data with animated axes and grid lines
Displaying statistical data with customizable scale types (linear, log, band)
Creating interactive data visualizations with spring-based animations
Building dashboard components with professional-grade axis rendering
Developing analytics interfaces with gradient-enhanced visual styling
ai_summary: Airbnb Axis is a data visualization component that renders professional chart axes with animated grid lines using @visx/react-spring. It supports multiple scale types (linear, log, band, time) and features spring-based animations with configurable trajectories. The component includes gradient styling and is designed for embedding in dashboards, analytics tools, and SaaS applications to display time-series and statistical data.
